headline: Goldman Sachs Initiates Coverage of Smurfit Westrock Plc (SW) With a Buy Rating
summary: Smurfit Westrock Plc (NYSE:SW) is one of the best affordable stocks to buy with good earnings growth. Goldman Sachs initiated coverage of Smurfit Westrock Plc (NYSE:SW) with a Buy rating on March 24, setting a price target of $49. headline: European Dividend Stocks To Watch
summary: As European markets navigate the uncertainty surrounding geopolitical tensions and energy price volatility, investors are keenly watching how these factors might influence economic growth and market sentiment. In this environment, dividend stocks can offer a measure of stability by providing regular income streams, making them an attractive option for those looking to mitigate risk amidst fluctuating market conditions.
